topic: Cell A cobot C305 power state on power-on

messages.text: cobot won't power the arm, pendant shows a C305 power state error
C305 group is power-state sequencing - it tried to power on while the state wasn't OFF, or the Energy Eater state is off. let the controller fully settle to idle first, then power on the arm
someone hit power-on twice quickly during boot
yep, that races the power state. fully power off, wait for idle, single power-on. if it persists, verify the safety output isn't wired to a power supply and update PolyScope
clean power-off then single power-on brought the arm up
